summary: Threat-model walk of callback wire surface. One Medium (callback.run skips signing.verify when RawSignature==null — wire bypass for any future channel ingest) and three Lows (Variables.Restore + ErrorCallback wire lack !-prefix filter mirror of auditor F2; no length/depth caps on JSON deserialize; SensitivePropertyFilter not applied to callback-wire serializers). Zero High. Bounded today by lack of HTTP/channel ingest of callbacks; F1 must close before Stage 5 wires that path.
